steps.t: The Blood-red footsteps begin at the Silver Deep Mine. Elladan suspects that they lead to wherever Skorgrím now lies. You should follow the red flower…

An unfriendly-looking keep now stands before you. You should scout the keep, for the trail indicates that Skorgrím's body may have been moved here.
